ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_year" INTEGER /* Year of initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is headquartered */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "future_price" REAL /* Future price of the stock */,
  "high_52_week" REAL /* 52-week high price of the stock */,
  "low_52_week" REAL /* 52-week low price of the stock */,
  "volume_avg_30" INTEGER /* Average trading volume over the last 30 days */,
  "volume_avg_90" INTEGER /* Average trading volume over the last 90 days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price change record */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price record */,
  "percent_increase" REAL /* Percent increase in price */,
  "error" REAL /* Error in price prediction */,
  "error_percentage" REAL /* Error percentage in price prediction */,
  "floor" REAL /* Floor price of the stock */,
  "ceiling" REAL /* Ceiling price of the stock */,
  "variance_score" REAL /* Variance score of the price prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_changes_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the listed companies */,
  "num_listed_companies" INTEGER /* Number of listed companies on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, risk manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the portfolio */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_feeds" (
  "news_feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news feed record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_feeds_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the social media post */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the social media user */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the social media post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sentiment" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Market sentiment (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the sentiment analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_sentiment_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_stock" (
  "exchange_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange stock record */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was listed on the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_stock_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_stock_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data record */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "realtime_data" (
  "realtime_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each real-time data record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the real-time data record */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Current trading volume of the stock */,
  "bid" REAL /* Current bid price of the stock */,
  "ask" REAL /* Current ask price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("realtime_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_realtime_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_screeners" (
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screener */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the screener */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the screener */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the screener was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "screener_stocks" (
  "screener_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each screener stock record */,
  "screener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the screener */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the screener */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screener_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screener_stocks_screener_id FOREIGN KEY ("screener_id") REFERENCES stock_screeners ("screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_screener_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the notification was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the portfolio */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the rating was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
